notes: Fixed section had no patterns to review — the merge script report listed zero mechanical fix counts, only 4 'could not fix' items.

The 4 dropped edges all referenced two missing function nodes: function:coffee-map/app/manifest.ts:manifest and function:coffee-map/app/page.tsx:Home. Both batch-1 edges pointed at these functions but the corresponding function-level nodes were never emitted by the LLM for those files — only file-level nodes were produced.
Recovered function:coffee-map/app/manifest.ts:manifest from manifest.ts (lines 3-32) and function:coffee-map/app/page.tsx:Home from page.tsx (lines 3-9) by reading the actual source files.
All 7 import-map edges were already present in the assembled graph before review. No cross-batch edges needed to be added.
No unknown node types or unknown complexity values were found in the graph. All nodes use valid type prefixes and complexity values (simple/moderate/complex).

Data quality is good overall. The only upstream issue was two files (manifest.ts, page.tsx) for which the LLM produced file nodes but omitted the corresponding function nodes, leaving their contains/exports edges dangling.
